hooks.name: drift-notice
hooks.description: Detect framework version drift on session start

hooks.name: context-enrichment
hooks.description: Inject framework context into every LLM turn

hooks.name: mcp-index-init
hooks.description: Initialize MCP tool index on session start if missing

hooks.name: mcp-index-update
hooks.description: Auto-update MCP index when mcp commands are detected

hooks.name: prompt-markers
hooks.description: Detect prompt markers (h:, f:, e:) and inject behavior context
